narrative: Runway incursion Category B at hub airport during night IMC. Crew did not comply with TCAS RA (resolution advisory) — opposite response observed on radar. Fuel exhaustion declared on approach after diversion. PIC duty time exceeded FAR 117. Recurrent training lapsed for both crew members. Maintenance log gap on the affected aircraft from 30 days prior; airworthiness directive overdue. No SMS documentation. Weather: VFR into IMC. CFIT avoided by GPWS warning at 200 ft. No PIREP filed. Loss of control inflight during recovery.
